Package jline.lang

Class ClassSwitchMatrix

java.lang.Object
jline.util.Matrix
jline.lang.ClassSwitchMatrix
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ClassSwitchMatrix extends Matrix
Class representing a probabilistic routing matrix
